ExpectedBackupPaths.Limitation: Only the expected path metadata was checked. Backup contents were not enumerated or read.

Findings.Title: Expected backup path is stale
Findings.Recommendation: Validate the backup job, schedule, storage target, and monitoring alerts before relying on this evidence.
Limitations: Directory contents were not enumerated or read.

Findings.Title: Backup-related service is present but health is unverified
Findings.Evidence: Visible backup-related services: wbengine. Service presence does not prove successful or recoverable backups.
Findings.Recommendation: Review backup job history, alerts, recent successful backup evidence, and restore test evidence with the system owner.
Limitations: Service inventory does not prove backup success, restoreability, or monitoring coverage.

Findings.Title: Restore test evidence was not provided
Findings.Evidence: This collector does not run restore operations and did not receive separate restore test evidence.
Findings.Recommendation: Confirm the date, scope, and result of the latest approved restore test.
Limitations: Restore readiness cannot be proven without a documented restore test.

Findings.Title: Backup monitoring evidence was not provided
Findings.Evidence: No backup monitoring alert or success/failure notification evidence was collected.
Findings.Recommendation: Confirm backup monitoring ownership, alert routing, and failure escalation procedures.
Limitations: Monitoring coverage should be validated in the backup or monitoring platform.
This collector does not read backup contents.
This collector does not run restore operations.
Local service or event evidence may not include centralized backup platform status.
Notes: Audit-only backup readiness evidence. No backup data is deleted, modified, restored, or read.
Service presence is not proof of healthy, successful, or recoverable backups.
Owner review is required before relying on any backup readiness conclusion.
